response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrable technical depth across languages and systems, including some AI-agent infrastructure work; however, he lacks explicit AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, and advanced AI education, which are core to the principal engineer role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Deep full-stack fluency across diverse languages (DLang, TypeScript, Node.js, etc.)
Strong engineering leadership via workshops, tooling, and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience
Lacks advanced degree in AI or related field (only BS in CS)
Limited visibility into large-scale cloud AI deployment or customer advisory experience
